<!-- wp:divi/code {"module":{"meta":{"adminLabel":{"desktop":{"value":"Footer CSS"}}}},"content":{"innerContent":{"desktop":{"value":"\u003cstyle\u003e\n.meridian-footer{background:#0F172A!important;color:rgba(255,255,255,.72);padding:80px 5vw 30px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}\n.meridian-footer:before{content:\u0026#39;\u0026#39;;position:absolute;width:400px;height:400px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(20,184,166,.15),transparent 70%);top:-160px;right:10%;filter:blur(60px);pointer-events:none}\n.meridian-footer .et_pb_row{max-width:1440px!important;width:100%!important;position:relative;z-index:2}\n.meridian-footer h4,.meridian-footer h5{color:#fff!important;font-family:\u0026#39;Plus Jakarta Sans\u0026#39;,sans-serif;font-weight:800}\n.meridian-footer p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.55)!important;line-height:1.7;font-size:14px}\n.meridian-footer a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.72)!important;text-decoration:none;transition:.25s ease}\n.meridian-footer a:hover{color:#14B8A6!important}\n.meridian-footer .footer-title{color:#fff!important;font-size:22px!important;font-weight:800!important;margin-bottom:14px}\n.meridian-footer .footer-heading{color:#fff!important;font-size:15px!important;font-weight:800!important;margin-bottom:18px}\n.meridian-footer .footer-link{display:block;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:14px}\n.meridian-footer .newsletter-box{display:flex;gap:0;border-radius:100px;overflow:hidden;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);padding:5px;margin-top:18px;max-width:310px}\n.meridian-footer .newsletter-box input{flex:1;background:transparent;border:0;outline:0;color:#fff;padding:10px 14px;font-size:13px;max-width:180px}\n.meridian-footer .newsletter-box button{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0E7490,#14B8A6);border:0;color:#fff;border-radius:100px;padding:10px 18px;font-weight:700;font-size:13px}\n.meridian-footer .footer-bottom-row{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);padding-top:26px;margin-top:30px}\n.meridian-footer .footer-bottom-row p{font-size:13px!important;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)!important}\n@media(max-width:980px){.meridian-footer{text-align:center}.meridian-footer .newsletter-box{margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}}\n\u003c/style\u003e"}}},"builderVersion":"5.0"} /-->
